tasks.label: MSVC build
args: "call \"C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Community\\VC\\Auxiliary\\Build\\vcvars64.bat\" && cd /d ${workspaceFolder}\\src && rc /nologo /fo resources.res resources.rc && cl /utf-8 /EHsc /O2 /MT /nologo /Fe:${workspaceFolder}\\bin\\AutoClicker.exe main.cpp resources.res user32.lib gdi32.lib shell32.lib comdlg32.lib advapi32.lib winmm.lib"

tasks.label: MinGW build
args: "cd /d ${workspaceFolder}\\src && windres resources.rc resources.o && g++ -O2 -std=c++17 -o ${workspaceFolder}\\bin\\AutoClicker.exe main.cpp resources.o -static -lgdi32 -luser32 -lshell32 -lcomdlg32 -ladvapi32 -lwinmm -mwindows"
